strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(4,12): error TLUA2558: Expected 0 type arguments, but got 1.
strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(4,15): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'mapFn'.
strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(4,20): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(4,23): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'state'.

strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(7,14): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Store'.
strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(7,29): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Store'.
strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua(14,13): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.


==== strictBestCommonSupertype.tlua (19 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/1222
    
    class Store<T = table> {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Store'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'T'.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                    ~~~~~~~~
        select<K>(mapFn: (state: T) => K) {};
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
               ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'K'.
               ~
!!! error TLUA2558: Expected 0 type arguments, but got 1.
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'mapFn'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'state'.
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ')' expected.
                                 ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'T'.
                                    ~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                                       ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'K'.
                                        ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
    }
    ~
!!! error TLUA2365: Operator '>' cannot be applied to types 'TableLib' and '{ 1: number & (any?, ...any); 2: any; 3: {}; }'.
    
    local store: Store = inject(Store);
                 ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Store'.
                                ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Store'.
    
    function inject<T>(token: ProviderToken<T>): T
        return {} as T;
    end
    
    interface Type<T> {
        new (...args: any[]): T;
                ~~~~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
    }
    
    type ProviderToken<T> = Type<T> | AbstractType<T>;
    
    interface AbstractType<T> {
        prototype: T;
    }
